caption: cyRespond to a property possession claim
pageTitle: cyWhat regular income do you receive?
heading: cyWhat regular income do you receive? (Optional)
hintText: cySelect all that apply. Enter total amount in pounds and pence, for example £148.00 or £148.50. The information you provide must be truthful and accurate.

options.incomeFromJobs: cyIncome from all jobs you do
options.moneyFromElsewhere: cyMoney from somewhere else (for example, child maintenance payments or someone in your household gives you money)

subFields.moneyFromElsewhereDetailsHint: cyGive details about the other sources of income and how much you usually receive

incomeFromJobsAmount.required: cyEnter the total amount you receive from all jobs you do
incomeFromJobsAmount.negative: cyThe total amount you receive from all jobs you do each week or month must be £0.00 or above
incomeFromJobsAmount.largeAmount: cyThe total amount you receive from all jobs you do each week or month must be less than £1 billion

incomeFromJobsFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently you receive income from all jobs you do

pensionAmount.required: cyEnter the total amount you receive from a state or private pension
pensionAmount.negative: cyThe total amount you receive from pension (state and private) each week or month must be £0.00 or above
pensionAmount.largeAmount: cyThe total amount you receive from pension (state and private) each week or month must be less than £1 billion

pensionFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently you receive income from a state or private pension

universalCreditAmount.required: cyEnter the total amount you receive from Universal Credit
universalCreditAmount.negative: cyThe total amount you receive from Universal Credit each week or month must be £0.00 or above
universalCreditAmount.largeAmount: cyThe total amount you receive from Universal Credit each week or month must be less than £1 billion

universalCreditFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently you receive Universal Credit

otherBenefitsAmount.required: cyEnter the total amount you receive from other benefits and credits
otherBenefitsAmount.negative: cyThe total amount you receive from other benefits and credit each week or month must be £0.00 or above
otherBenefitsAmount.largeAmount: cyThe total amount you receive from other benefits and credit each week or month must be less than £1 billion

otherBenefitsFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently you receive income from other benefits and credits

moneyFromElsewhereDetails.required: cyEnter details about the money you receive from somewhere else and how much you usually receive
moneyFromElsewhereDetails.invalidCharacters: cyGive details about the other sources of income and how much you usually receive must only include letters a to z, and special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes

amount.invalidFormat: cyEnter an amount in the correct format, for example 148.00 or 148.50
